      <dct:abstract>This dataset is the definitive set of locality boundaries for the state of Victoria            as defined by Local Government and registered by the Registrar of Geographic Names.            The boundaries are aligned to Vicmap Property. This dataset is part of the Vicmap Admin dataset series.</dct:abstract>
